_comment: Scrubbed real Jira REST payloads captured via the production AcliClient methods. Regenerate with scripts/capture_jira_fixtures.py (REBAR_CAPTURE_JIRA_FIXTURES=1). DO NOT hand-edit — fixtures must stay an honest mirror of real Jira shapes (see docs/jira-fixtures.md).
